$comment: Client-bundle budgets, enforced by scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs (--check) after `next build` in CI. Values are KB gzip and include the shared rootMainFiles baseline. Measured at v1.27.15 + the mobile/PWA fix wave: / 417, /insights 402, /measurements 405, /insights/mood 419, total 2683, baseline 129 — budgets carry ~10-15% headroom so the gate catches step changes (a statically imported ~100 KB catalog, a ~90 KB duplicated library chunk), not noise. Raise a number consciously, in the PR that pays the cost, with the reason in the PR body. Fork ADHS Stage B.2 (v1.31.10): total 2950 → 2970 for the medication check-in reminder settings card (a small additive client chunk on the notifications settings route).
